The fuller picture — prototypes

4 minimal directions · same florals · pick one to build

01 · Editorial stem 02 · Quiet cards 03 · Botanical index 04 · Airy poster
Concept 01

Editorial single-stem

One elegant stem against open space, paired with a quiet numbered list. No bouquet, no cards — the restraint does the talking. Asymmetric and print-like.

Concept 02

Quiet cards & a single sprig

A calm, symmetric 2×2 of hairline cards — no frosted glass, no heavy shadows. A lone leaf-sprig tucked at two corners is the only floral gesture. Structured and understated.

Concept 03

Botanical index

Each facet gets one specimen bloom above it, laid out like a museum index — a single clean row, hairline dividers between. The flowers become labels, not decoration.

Concept 04

Airy poster

The title is the hero — oversized and centered, with a few soft blooms drifting in at low opacity for depth. The four facets sit quietly beneath as a slim, even index. Gallery-poster calm.
